{{Infobox location
| name = Mount Venture
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Mount Venture Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Mount Venture is one of the four holy peaks located in [[Sacred Valley]], situated to the west of the region. It is characterized by its rust-red cliffs and a distinct mineral composition that makes it the primary site for mining within the valley. The mountain is controlled by the [[Kazan clan]] and the [[Golden Sword School]], who share the profits generated from its resources. The most significant materials extracted from the mountain include goldsteel and [[halfsilver]], which are often transported by armored stone dogs known as craghounds. During a period of intense conflict, the mountain was destroyed, cracking open to reveal a golden treasure within. Following its destruction, the remains of the mountain continued to emit yellow light from its core, even after a [[Titan]] had fed upon it.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan]] wagons are laden with goods from [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c8">''Unsouled'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mount Venture]] is located to the west of [[Sacred Valley]] and features rust-red cliffs.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Mount Venture]] is the shortest of the four holy peaks and is a primary site for mining in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[Kazan clan]] and the [[Golden Sword School]] share the profits from mining on [[Mount Venture]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Located to the west, Mount Venture was once a sacred, squat peak characterized by its red-tinged color and surrounding distant peaks. However, the landmark eventually vanished entirely. This loss left the once-revered site in a state of complete ruin.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is a sacred peak to the west.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is a squat red-tinged peak to the west.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is a location with distant peaks.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is located to the west.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Lindon]] wonders if [[Mount Venture]] is still intact.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is gone.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mount Venture]] is in ruins.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mount Venture]] is a shattered mountain that emits yellow light.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
